commands.repair_reason: Draft, dirty, maintainer-labeled PR needs author or maintainer rebase plus review-finding fixes before validation, not a ClawSweeper replacement branch.; Needs attention: Approval prompt integrity needs attention because the patch can drop, misalign, or omit risk information before a user approves a command.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve command analysis in approval requests — src/gateway/server-methods/exec-approv... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds parser-backed exec approval explanation and highlight metadata through agent approval registration, Gateway protocol/payloads, forwarded approval text, view models, and Control UI rendering, plus tests, changelog, and an npm registry pin.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main plus the latest PR head shows the commandAnalysis preservation gap, raw parser offsets being applied to sanitized display text, direct carrier inline-eval detection being skipped, and empty generated explanation lines.
commands.review_followup: Draft, dirty, maintainer-labeled PR needs author or maintainer rebase plus review-finding fixes before validation, not a ClawSweeper replacement branch.
